name: My boss says no workers comp because I was careless falling off ladder, is that true?

mainEntity.name: My boss says no workers comp because I was careless falling off ladder, is that true?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, workers' comp covers regardless of your fault.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, workers' comp is no-fault**—carelessness doesn't bar benefits in Utah/Idaho.[1]

Employer can't deny for your alleged fault; only if not on job.[2]

- Report anyway; insurer decides.
- Document supervisor conversation.
- Fault irrelevant unless gross misconduct.

Push back; consult lawyer if pressured.

description: No, workers' comp covers regardless of your fault.
